description: Configuration for connecting Power BI Desktop to the pipeline's exported CSVs and, optionally, scheduling a Power BI Service refresh via the REST API once real Azure data replaces the synthetic set.

refresh.note: Switch to 'scheduled' and fill in workspace/dataset IDs (see config/.env.example) once the dataset is published to Power BI Service.

recommended_visuals.infrastructure_health_overview: utilization_overview.csv -> card + gauge visuals per resource_type
recommended_visuals.forecast_trend_graphs: utilization_overview.csv -> line chart, filtered by date, 4wk/12wk bookmarks
recommended_visuals.risk_indicators: risk_summary.csv -> stacked bar chart by resource_type/risk_level
recommended_visuals.recommendation_summaries: recommendations.csv -> table visual with ai_narrative column
